headline: Super vs Siri — personal AI agents compared for real computer work

site_brief.goal: Create a fair but persuasive competitor comparison page for Super vs Siri. Use supplied sources for current facts, avoid fake claims, and make the practical argument that Super is better suited for repeated computer-use work because its cache can lower repeated execution cost.
site_brief.title: Super vs Siri

summary: Siri AI is becoming a deeply integrated, privacy‑forward assistant inside Apple devices. Super is built for a different job: durable personal AI agents that actually operate computers and reuse a computer-use cache so repeated workflows get faster and cheaper over time. This page fairly compares where Siri shines — and where Super is the sharper alternative for repeated computer-use automation.
